channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-879] Detail rename opertion in stats file
item.description: Add patches for telling same dir rename and between dir rename and also remembering the source and target dir size, so we can collect detail stats of rename.
item.summary: Detail rename opertion in stats file

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b2_1 » i686,client,el5,inkernel #41
LU-879 mds: Add a few rename stats under /proc (Revision d06acf0e3d1074fd663e16c0e9a58630c4c5d1d9)

Result = SUCCESS
